<!-- Thanks for contributing a skill. Keep it small and predictable — see CONTRIBUTING.md. -->

## What this PR does

<!-- One or two sentences. Which skill does it add or change, and why? -->

## Type

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Fix / improvement to an existing skill
- [ ] Docs only

## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and the skill meets the bar (small `SKILL.md`, tool-agnostic wording, no no-ops or sediment, branching reference behind a pointer).
- [ ] The `SKILL.md` frontmatter has `name` and `description` (plus `disable-model-invocation: true` if it's user-invoked).
- [ ] I added or updated the skill's row in the README Skills table.
- [ ] **No hidden or harmful instructions.** Everything the skill tells an agent to do is stated plainly — no data exfiltration, destructive commands, secret-stealing, or prompt-injection. A maintainer will read the full `SKILL.md` before merging.
- [ ] If this skill is adapted from someone else's work, I credited the source.
